violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC informed. Ice disposed. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The floors under the prep tables and 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
